calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Off Calendar

Ntc To Schedule Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, JONATHAY NEIL & ASSOCIATES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) G FLOR, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, MING KONG AKA MING S. KONG, AKA MING SHAN KONG, AN INDIVIDUAL; BAOHUA LI, AN INDIVIDUAL.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 50 dismissed without prejudice.
Loreen Seia Jung sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $105,814.34
Pre-Judgment Interest: $10,407.49
Attorney's Fees: $26,453.58
Costs: $595.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $143,270.41
Judgment signed in open court.
The clerk of the court will not enter the judgment until the Original of the Promissory Note is submitted for the court for cancellation.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Continued To Mar-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Continued To Feb-04-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
